news.title: 'Regime change but in a velvet glove': How Kevin Warsh has set out to remake the Fed
news.summary: The first big announced changes point toward a quiet revolution. Task forces set up to rethink virtually everything done at the Fed. The first big changes are expected to be announced in the coming months.

news.title: No one wants AI data centers on Earth. Do they make sense in space?
news.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX is betting big on orbital AI data centers. The public doesn't want them on Earth, but the economic case for space-based is questionable.

news.title: Raising the minimum wage has been a big political winner. Now it's running into resistance
news.summary: Raising the minimum wage has been a progressive policy winner at the ballot box. But recent losses suggest an economic mood slowing its political momentum.

news.title: Top Wall Street analysts like these 3 dividend stocks for solid returns
news.summary: TipRanks discusses three dividend-paying stocks. TipRanks: Three dividend- paying stocks to buy now. Click through the gallery to see which stocks are on the list.

news.title: AI buildout gives tech investors new reasons to watch bond market
news.summary: Tech giants are depleting cash reserves and raising debt in their ambitious data center buildouts. The dynamic is forcing investors to watch interest rates.

news.title: ‘We own our home outright’: I am 67 and earn $100,000. Do I take my $30,000-a-year Social Security now or wait?
news.summary: “We have combined savings of $950,000 in retirement plans, Roth IRAs and Treasuries,” she says.

news.title: My two sons will inherit a $30,000 annuity from their grandmother. What should I do with the money?
news.summary: “My understanding is that they have five years to withdraw the money,” he said. “I don’t know if they’re going to be able to do that.”

news.title: Micron’s earnings are a must-watch market event — with profit growth approaching 1,000%
news.summary: Micron’s massive growth is “coming at nearly pure profit,’’ says analyst. Micron is starting to have real implications for the S&P 500.

news.title: This bull market isn’t going to end because of Fed rate hikes under Warsh
news.summary: Warsh may hope the threat of rate hikes is enough. But stocks might gain ground if he does, and past rate-hike cycles can be a guide.

news.title: ‘We are habitually frugal’: My wife and I have money. How do we help our children without ruining their independence?
news.summary: “Partly due to some mental-health issues, they may continue to go through life living paycheck to paycheck, or worse,” she says.
